extension.news:
v. 1.0.14 "Featherlight" - 2026-06-14 - **Global Search 2.0**: Reworked global search with selectable sources, Select All Sites, combined presets, cached result pages, stable return-to-results after playback and playable-video-only results. - **Featherlight Optimization**: Major addon size and cleanup pass; compressed logo assets and removed stale caches, unused vendor modules and verification leftovers while preserving Android/Cloudflare compatibility. - **Vendor Cleanup**: Trimmed unused cloudscraper captcha integrations, optional JS interpreters, requests_toolbelt, charset_normalizer, six, obsolete browser metadata and unused IDNA UTS-46 data, then verified the remaining networking stack. - **Settings Cleanup**: Cleaned site toggles, duplicate settings and mouse-navigation hitbox issues so active sites and sort options stay aligned. - **New Site**: Added JizzBerry with newest/top listings, search, filtered categories, pagination, real site icon and highest-quality direct MP4 playback/recording support. - **New Site**: Added MyLust with listings, search, filtered video categories, pagination, sorting, real homepage logo and highest-quality direct MP4 playback/recording support. - **New Site**: Added Hentaisea with latest episodes, series listings, search, filtered genre categories, pagination, real homepage logo and DooPlay/JWPlayer signed MP4 playback/recording support. - **New Site**: Added PimpBunny with listings, search, categories, model directory, pagination, sorting, real homepage logo and high-quality KVS MP4 playback/recording support. - **New Site**: Added ShesFreaky with listings, search, categories, pagination, sorting, real homepage logo and direct MP4 playback/recording support.
v. 1.0.13 "Rangefinder" - 2026-06-13 - **New Site**: Added MyPornTape with listings, search, categories, models, pagination, sorting, real homepage logo and KVS MP4 playback/recording support. - **New Site**: Added FamilyPornHD with listings, categories, search, pagination, real homepage logo and WatchStreamHD HLS resolver playback. - **New Resolver**: Added WatchStreamHD resolver that rewrites CDN-auth HLS playlists to fully qualified URLs for seek-safe local playback. - **New Site**: Added PornoBae with listings, search, categories, pagination and playback via the custom TubexPlayer HLS resolver. - **Experimental Site**: Added AllPornStream as a contained catalog/mirror experiment with listings, search, actors, categories, producers, pagination and playback via the shared resolver preference stack. - **AllPornStream/MyDaddy**: Added a shared MyDaddy resolver that follows the browser alt-player path and resolves old MyDaddy-only posts to fresh BigCDN MP4 streams. - **New Site**: Added Xtapes with listings, search, categories, pagination, sort options, real homepage logo and shared 88z HLS resolver playback/recording support. - **New Resolver**: Added reusable 88z player resolution with encrypted API decoding and HLS stream probing for sites using the same embed player. - **New Site**: Added CamgirlFap with listings, search, categories, models, pagination, sorting, cached thumbnails, real homepage logo and KVS MP4 playback/recording support through the seek-safe local Range proxy. - **Sextb.net**: Added shared resolver preferences, resolver enable switches and pre-playback stream health checks so unstable/dead server choices can fall through to the next supported resolver before playback starts. - **Global Search**: Filtered captured results to playable video items only, preventing source Search/Categories/Models navigation entries from appearing in global result pages. - **Playback Proxy**: Fixed urllib proxy seek handling by giving each Range request its own cancel signal, preventing stale connections from surviving fast seeks. - **CamgirlFap Playback**: Fixed stream probe rejecting plain MP4 URLs without quality suffix; both quality-tagged and plain links are now probed and accepted. - **Playback Proxy DNS**: Fixed intermittent seek freezes (Windows Errno 11002) with pre-resolve IP cache and http.client fallback so seeks never need a fresh DNS lookup.
v. 1.0.12 "Signal Lock" - 2026-06-01 - **85po Android**: Fixed Android/Kodi Cloudflare 403 failures by reusing a browser-like session for listings, parsing and MP4 delivery. - **LuxureTV**: Repaired listing extraction after the site markup changed and made metadata parsing resilient when durations are missing. - **FFmpeg Recorder**: Added the "Video herunterladen" context action, shared stream resolution hooks and in-process proxy routing for protected downloads. - **Recording Support**: Enabled FFmpeg recording paths for 85po, HStream, Ikisoda and XXXTube. - **New Site**: Added AllowFlash with listings, search, categories, pagination, premium filtering, DNS retry handling and seek-safe MP4 playback through a local Range proxy. - **New Site**: Added NotFans with listings, search, tag categories, pagination, sorting and KVS MP4 playback. - **New Site**: Added WOW.xxx with listings, search, categories, pagination, sorting and configurable MP4 quality preference. - **New Site**: Added XXThots with listings, search, categories, pagination, sorting and Android-safe proxy-backed MP4 playback. - **New Site**: Added JAVSubbed.net with listings, categories (English Subbed, Censored, Uncensored), actress directory, studios, search, and dynamic resolver playback and recording support. - **New Site**: Added Sextb.net with listings, categories (Amateur, Censored, Uncensored, English Subtitle), search, actress/studio/genre directories, pagination, and player decryption support. - **New Site**: Added Porn4Fans with listings, search, categories, models, pagination, sorting, cached thumbnails and KVS MP4 playback/recording support. - **New Site**: Added YesPornVIP with listings, search, models, pagination, sorting and KVS MP4 playback/recording support. - **New Site**: Added Tgtsporn with listings, search, models, pagination, sorting and KVS MP4 playback/recording support. - **New Site**: Added PornMedium with listings, search, categories, pagination, sorting and MP4 quality selection. - **KVS Engine**: Added reusable KVSTubeWebsite base class for rapid KVS tube site integration. - **Global Search**: Added a controlled multi-site search entry with selectable sources, source presets, progressive paging, profile-aware result caching, stable return-to-results behavior after playback and per-source result limits to avoid slow all-site scans. - **NoodleMagazine**: Reworked playback resolution to use the official nmcorp player playlist before falling back to raw page MP4 extraction, avoiding stale CDN77 403 links. - **View Settings**: Restored persistent view selection while avoiding per-page overrides of Kodi-side view changes. - **Removed**: UFlash, because the site now requires login/paywall access for playable streams and no longer provides public video URLs. - **Stability**: Hardened recording directory creation and directory action termination across Windows and Android Kodi setups.
extension.description:
Internet [COLOR red]XXX Porn Video[COLOR white] Streams.
[COLOR red][B]WARNING:[/B][COLOR red]Only for adults[/COLOR]
[COLOR white]AdultHideout does not host third-party videos on its own servers and is not affiliated with the websites supported by the addon. Content, streams and metadata are provided by third-party websites.[/COLOR]
[COLOR white]Github: https://github.com/Vashiel/repository.adulthideout [/COLOR]
extension.disclaimer: AdultHideout does not host third-party videos on its own servers and is not affiliated with the websites supported by the addon. Content, streams and metadata are provided by third-party websites.
